Notice Of Motion To Compel
Off Calendar Jan-23-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANTS MARIE JHIN AND PREMIER DERMATOLOGY'S Motion To Compel is Off calendar. Case settled.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-14-2016 Set For Trial On Feb-06-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-17-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. LESLIE FALES, ESQ. of Wood Smith Henning & Berman LLP, Tel No. 925-222-3400 appearing telephonically for Defendant Premier Dermatology and Dr. Marie Jhin;
No other appearances made in this matter.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS MARIE JHIN AND PREMIER DERMATOLOGY'S motion to strike the punitive damages allegations is granted without leave to amend. Plaintiff has not alleged facts showing that defendants acted with malice, fraud or oppression nor has plaintiff provided any indication that she would be able to do so if she were granted leave to amend. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)
